---
id: get-automation-capabilities
title: "查询所有支持自动化的设备功能点"
description: "获取所有设备中可用于创建 Flow 自动化的功能点信息。返回内容包括各功能点的值类型、单位，以及其在自动化流程中的适用环节（如可作为触发器、条件或操作）。"
sidebar_label: "查询所有支持自动化的设备功能点"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: i18n/zh/docusaurus-plugin-content-docs/version-Beta/aqara-api/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"查询所有支持自动化的设备功能点"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/automations/capabilities"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



获取所有设备中可用于创建 Flow 自动化的功能点信息。返回内容包括各功能点的值类型、单位，以及其在自动化流程中的适用环节（如可作为触发器、条件或操作）。

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"query","name":"definitionType","required":false,"schema":{"type":"string","enum":["SCRIPT_JSON"]},"description":"自动化类型。当前仅支持 SCRIPT_JSON（即 Flow 自动化）。"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"请求发起成功","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"消息类型"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"接口版本","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"消息 ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"业务状态码，0 表示成功"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"提示信息"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"object","nullable":true,"properties":{"devices":{"type":"array","description":"可用于自动化编排的设备能力列表","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceId","deviceName","endpoints"],"properties":{"deviceId":{"type":"string","description":"设备ID"},"deviceName":{"type":"string","description":"设备名称"},"endpoints":{"type":"array","description":"设备端点列表","items":{"type":"object","required":["endpointName","endpointId","properties"],"properties":{"endpointName":{"type":"string","description":"端点名称"},"endpointId":{"type":"integer","description":"端点ID"},"properties":{"type":"array","description":"端点可用能力列表（功能点/事件/命令）","items":{"type":"object","required":["deviceType","functionCode","functionName","valueType","semanticRole"],"properties":{"deviceType":{"type":"string","description":"设备类型"},"functionCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能编码"},"functionName":{"type":"string","description":"功能名称"},"traitCode":{"type":"string","description":"功能点代码（valueType 非 cmd 时常见）"},"traitName":{"type":"string","description":"功能点名称"},"commandCode":{"type":"string","description":"命令编码（valueType 为 cmd 时常见）"},"commandName":{"type":"string","description":"命令名称"},"valueType":{"type":"string","description":"值类型（如 boolean/number/enum/event/cmd）"},"semanticRole":{"type":"array","description":"自动化环节角色","items":{"type":"string","enum":["starter","condition","action"]}},"unit":{"type":"string","description":"单位（如 %, °C, lx 等）"},"valueRange":{"type":"object","description":"数值范围或枚举范围","properties":{"min":{"type":"number","format":"double","description":"最小值"},"max":{"type":"number","format":"double","description":"最大值"},"enumRange":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","description":"枚举范围","required":["value","key"],"properties":{"value":{"type":"string","description":"枚举值（接口返回中通常为字符串）"},"key":{"type":"string","description":"枚举显示文案"}},"title":"AutomationCapabilityEnumItem"}}},"title":"AutomationCapabilityValueRange"}},"title":"AutomationCapabilityProperty"}}},"title":"AutomationCapabilityEndpoint"}}},"title":"AutomationCapabilityDevice"}}},"title":"AutomationCapabilitiesData"}}}],"example":{"type":"QueryAutomationCapabilitiesResponse","version":"v1","msgId":"52ebd835-1b8d-48f7-ab30-741d7c1ae0ee","code":0,"message":"success","data":{"devices":[{"deviceId":"lumi3.a61fca0f4da1a0bd","deviceName":"Edge Deletion Prevention notification (child
